//redirects: The two /blog -> / redirects that used to live here have been REMOVED — they
are what made the blog unreachable. They were `permanent: true` (301), which
browsers and Google cache aggressively, so after deploying:
1. Request indexing for /blog and a post URL in Search Console.
2. Test in a private window — your own browser has the old 301 cached.
//rewrites: Rewrites only fire when NO static file matches the path — that is why there is
no sitemap.xml on disk (build.js writes lib/sitemap-static.json instead), and
why /seoteam/app.js resolves to the real bundle rather than the SPA fallback.
ORDER MATTERS: the first match wins, so /seoteam/preview/:id must precede the
